---
title: "03b — Antisemitism Seed Lexicon and Score Articles"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Antisemitism seed lexicon

This lexicon is used **only** to stratify the labeling sample for RoBERTa
fine-tuning. The final antisemitism classifier is RoBERTa Large, not lexicon-based.

```{r lexicon}
# Print lexicon categories
for (cat_name in names(ANTISEM_LEXICON)) {
  cat(cat_name, ":\n  ", paste(ANTISEM_LEXICON[[cat_name]], collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
}

message("Total unique seed terms: ", length(ANTISEM_TERMS_ALL))
```

## Score all articles

```{r score}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(parallel)

scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
antisem_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_antisem_scored")
dir.create(antisem_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Save lexicon for reproducibility
saveRDS(ANTISEM_LEXICON, file.path(MODELS_DIR, "antisem_lexicon.rds"))

# Identify files still needing scoring
scored_files <- list.files(scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
n_total <- length(scored_files)

todo_files <- scored_files[!sapply(scored_files, function(sf) {
  yr <- gsub(".*scored_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", sf)
  file.exists(file.path(antisem_dir, paste0("antisem_scored_", yr, ".parquet")))
})]

message(n_total - length(todo_files), " / ", n_total, " years already done. ",
        length(todo_files), " remaining.")

if (length(todo_files) > 0) {
  # Progress log directory
  progress_dir <- file.path(antisem_dir, ".progress")
  dir.create(progress_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Worker function: self-contained, loads its own libraries
  score_one_year <- function(sf, antisem_dir, lexicon, terms_all, helpers_path) {
    library(arrow)
    library(data.table)
    source(helpers_path)

    yr <- gsub(".*scored_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", sf)
    outpath <- file.path(antisem_dir, paste0("antisem_scored_", yr, ".parquet"))
    prog_file <- file.path(antisem_dir, ".progress", paste0(yr, ".txt"))

    # Double-check in case another worker finished it
    if (file.exists(outpath)) return(paste0("Year ", yr, ": already exists, skipped"))

    # Progress: loading
    writeLines(paste0("LOADING ", Sys.time()), prog_file)

    t0 <- Sys.time()
    dt <- as.data.table(read_parquet(sf))
    n_rows <- nrow(dt)

    # Progress: scoring
    writeLines(paste0("SCORING ", format(n_rows, big.mark=","), " articles  started ", Sys.time()), prog_file)

    # Overall antisemitism score
    dt[, antisem_score := lexicon_score(article, terms_all)]

    # Progress: sub-categories
    n_cats <- length(lexicon)
    for (i in seq_along(lexicon)) {
      cat_name <- names(lexicon)[i]
      col_name <- paste0("antisem_", cat_name, "_score")
      dt[, (col_name) := lexicon_score(article, lexicon[[cat_name]])]
      writeLines(paste0("SCORING category ", i, "/", n_cats, " (", cat_name, ")  ",
                        round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units="mins")),1), " min"), prog_file)
    }

    # Progress: writing
    writeLines(paste0("WRITING ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
    write_parquet(dt, outpath)
    rm(dt); gc()

    elapsed <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "mins")), 1)
    writeLines(paste0("DONE ", format(n_rows, big.mark=","), " articles in ", elapsed, " min"), prog_file)
    paste0("Year ", yr, ": ", format(n_rows, big.mark = ","),
           " articles in ", elapsed, " min")
  }

  # Use 3 parallel workers (~30-40 GB each fits in 128 GB with headroom)
  N_WORKERS <- 3L
  message("Starting ", N_WORKERS, " parallel workers for ", length(todo_files), " files...")
  t_start_all <- Sys.time()

  cl <- makeCluster(N_WORKERS)
  results <- parLapply(cl, todo_files, score_one_year,
                       antisem_dir = antisem_dir,
                       lexicon = ANTISEM_LEXICON,
                       terms_all = ANTISEM_TERMS_ALL,
                       helpers_path = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
  stopCluster(cl)

  # Print results
  for (r in results) message(r)

  message("\nAll years complete. Total wall time: ",
          round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t_start_all, units = "mins")), 1), " min")
} else {
  message("Nothing to do — all years already scored.")
}
```

## Summary statistics

```{r summary}
library(dplyr)

antisem_files <- list.files(antisem_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
ds <- open_dataset(antisem_files)

score_summary <- ds |>
  summarise(
    n_articles = n(),
    mean_antisem = mean(antisem_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_antisem = sd(antisem_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90_antisem = quantile(antisem_score, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    p99_antisem = quantile(antisem_score, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    share_any_antisem = mean(antisem_score > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  collect()

print(score_summary)

# Score distribution by decade
decade_scores <- ds |>
  mutate(decade = as.integer(year / 10) * 10L) |>
  group_by(decade) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_score = mean(antisem_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    share_any = mean(antisem_score > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  collect() |>
  arrange(decade)

print(decade_scores)
```
